rules.rule_text:
rule Dexter
{
	meta:
		description = "Dexter malware memory injection detection"
		in_the_wild = true

	strings:
		$a = "Resilience"
		$b = "download-"
		$c = "update-"
		$d = "checkin:"
		$e = "uninstall"
		$f = "CurrentVersion\\Run"
		$g = "response="
		$h = "gateway.php"
		$i = "iexplore.exe"

	condition:
		all of them
}
